name: the actual generation logic
script:
hostel = frappe.form_dict.hostel
month = frappe.form_dict.month
academic_year = frappe.form_dict.academic_year

if not (hostel and month and academic_year):
    frappe.throw("Hostel, Month and Academic Year are required.")

admissions = frappe.get_all(
    "Hostel Admission",
    filters={
        "hostel": hostel,
        "academic_year": academic_year,
        "admission_status": "Checked In"
    },
    fields=["name", "student", "monthly_fee"]
)

created = 0
skipped = 0

for adm in admissions:
    already_exists = frappe.db.exists("Hostel Fee", {
        "hostel_admission": adm.name,
        "month": month,
        "academic_year": academic_year,
        "fee_type": "Room Rent"
    })

    if already_exists:
        skipped += 1
        continue

    fee = frappe.get_doc({
        "doctype": "Hostel Fee",
        "student": adm.student,
        "hostel_admission": adm.name,
        "hostel": hostel,
        "month": month,
        "academic_year": academic_year,
        "fee_type": "Room Rent",
        "amount": adm.monthly_fee,
        "due_date": frappe.utils.add_days(frappe.utils.today(), 7),
        "payment_status": "Pending"
    })
    fee.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
    created += 1

frappe.db.commit()
frappe.response["message"] = f"Created {created} fee record(s). Skipped {skipped} (already existed)."
